chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 150 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.1489/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 06.05.2024 Applicant, Umar Ghoto present in person >>>>>..<<<<< I have heard the applicant in person, whose application for registration of FIR against proposed accused, has been dismissed vide impugned order dated 22.03.2024, which is based on proper reasons and requires no interference by this Court. If applicant is aggrieved, still he may avail the alternate remedy, if any, before the proper forum. Accordingly, this application along with listed application is disposed of in the above terms. Judge ARBROHI
